si_title: Data (Use and Access) Act 2025 (Commencement No. 6 and Transitional and Saving Provisions) Regulations 2026

si_title: Data Protection, Privacy and Electronic Communications (Amendments etc) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019
provisions_commenced: Creates UK GDPR as a retained version of EU GDPR with UK-specific modifications; amends DPA 2018 and PECR to reflect Brexit; establishes ICO as the competent authority for UK data protection post-Brexit
processing_activities: All personal data processing activities subject to UK GDPR; international data transfers; ICO regulatory functions
relevance_tag: UK GDPR; Brexit; retained EU law; GDPR domestication; ICO; data protection reform; EU Exit SI

processing_activities: All personal data processing; law enforcement processing; intelligence services processing; ICO enforcement powers

si_title: Privacy and Electronic Communications (EC Directive) Regulations 2003
parent_act_name: European Communities Act 1972 (implementing EU ePrivacy Directive 2002/58/EC)
provisions_commenced: Full PECR regime: Regulations 19-24 (electronic marketing consent rules for email text fax automated calls); Regulations 5-8 (cookies and similar technologies); Regulations 21 and 26 (TPS and CTPS); ICO enforcement powers for PECR breaches up to £500k
processing_activities: Electronic marketing processing; cookie and tracking technology processing; direct marketing by electronic means; telephone preference scheme
relevance_tag: PECR; Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations 2003; cookies; direct marketing; spam; TPS; CTPS; ICO enforcement; electronic marketing; primary enforcement tool

si_title: Privacy and Electronic Communications (EC Directive) (Amendment) Regulations 2011
parent_act_name: Privacy and Electronic Communications (EC Directive) Regulations 2003
provisions_commenced: Regulation 6 amendment: strengthened cookie consent rules requiring prior informed consent before placing cookies (except strictly necessary); removes soft opt-in for cookies; implements revised EU ePrivacy Directive 2009/136/EC
processing_activities: Cookie processing; online tracking; behavioural advertising; website analytics
relevance_tag: PECR amendment; cookies; consent; ePrivacy Directive; cookie law; ICO enforcement
